questions.label: AI Infrastructure Maturity
questions.prompt: We have production-grade ML infrastructure and deployment pipelines in place.
questions.typed_response: We are fully AI-powered and leveraging cutting-edge transformative technology to drive synergistic outcomes.

questions.label: Data Quality Ownership
questions.prompt: We have clearly assigned data quality ownership and a formal data dictionary.
questions.typed_response: Ownership is informal. No formal data dictionary yet. Issues tracked ad hoc.

questions.label: Data Accessibility
questions.prompt: Cross-functional data is formatted and available for model training.
